app.name: Oh My Coder
app.one_liner: A Chinese-focused, open-source multi-agent AI coding assistant supporting 12+ domestic LLMs with full offline operation and zero-cost usage.

screens.name: Main Interface
screens.purpose: Provide entry point for user to input coding tasks and view agent responses in Chinese.

screens.name: Model Configuration
screens.purpose: Allow user to configure API keys and select among 12+ supported Chinese LLMs.

rust_commands.name: omc_config_set
rust_commands.purpose: Set configuration parameters such as API keys for supported models.

rust_commands.name: omc_run
rust_commands.purpose: Execute a natural language coding command using the configured LLM and agent system.

mvp_plan: week 1: Build basic agent routing logic for 31-agent system
week 1: Implement core CLI with omc run and omc config set commands
week 1: Integrate GLM-4.7-Flash as default free model
acceptance_tests: Chinese error messages are displayed on configuration failure
System prompts for missing DEEPSEEK_API_KEY when DeepSeek model is selected
User can install via install.sh and run 'omc run "你好"' without errors
Web interface loads with localized Chinese labels
